title: Add app-ads.txt file for Google AdMob verification

requirements.text: Create and serve a static app-ads.txt file at the path /app-ads.txt (accessible at https://fruitmatch-1cz.caffeine.xyz/app-ads.txt) with the following content: `google.com, pub-7936595519986908, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0`
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to https://fruitmatch-1cz.caffeine.xyz/app-ads.txt returns the file with the exact content: `google.com, pub-7936595519986908, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0`
The file is served as plain text (text/plain content type)
The file is placed in the frontend/public directory so it is served as a static asset at the root path /app-ads.txt

constraints: The app-ads.txt file content must exactly match: google.com, pub-7936595519986908, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0
Do not modify any existing game logic or backend code
nonGoals: AdMob SDK integration or ad serving
Any changes to gameplay, UI, or backend
